options.name: -v
options.description: --version          Display the program version and exit

options.name: -q
options.description: --quiet            Do not echo informational messages to standard output

options.name: -s
options.description: --silent           Same as --quiet but also suppresses user generated log messages

options.name: -f
options.description: --nakefile FILE    Use FILE as the Nake project file

options.name: -d
options.description: --directory DIR    Use DIR as current directory

options.name: --runner
options.description: Use NAME as runner file name in task listing

options.name: -t
options.description: --trace            Enables task execution tracing and full stack traces in exception messages

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enables full script debugging in Visual Studio

options.name: -n
options.description: --framework ID     Specify .net framework version to use (eg, netcoreapp6.0)

options.name: -T
options.description: --tasks [PATTERN]  Display the tasks with descriptions matching optional PATTERN and exit
